missions.name: T01 - Teddy Bear's Picnic
missions.description:
Attacker
I take the "Dig In" option
OpFor takes "The Forest is on Fire" option

objectives.title: Breakout!
objectives.description: Exit at least 50% of the units from the Defender's home edge

objectives.title: Denying Pursuit
objectives.description: Destroy or Cripple at least 50% of Defender's units before 50% of the Attacker's units have exited from the Defender's home edge

objectives.title: Frenzy
objectives.description: Destroy or cripple all of the Defender's units before 50% of the Attacker's units have exited from the Defender's home edge

objectives.title: [Option] Dig In
objectives.description: Up to 50% of the Defender's units may begin the game deployed as Hidden Units in the Defender's half of the map

objectives.title: Push Through
objectives.description: Move at least half the force out of the defender's edge

objectives.title: Hold the field
objectives.description: Destroy or cripple 100% of the opposing force

snapshots.label: Prior to mission: T01 - Teddy Bear's Picnic
